invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破88000（低于当前支撑）或资金费率转为负且低于-0.01%（空头压力加剧），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 88000 (below current support) or funding rate turns negative and below -0.01% (short pressure intensifies).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.118（支撑位）或资金费率转为负且低于-0.005%（空头压力增加），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.118 (support) or funding rate turns negative and below -0.005% (short pressure increases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2950（低于当前低点）或资金费率Z-score转为正值且高于+50%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2950 (below current low) or funding Z-score turns positive and above +50% (short pressure eases).
